Book a Paid Discovery Call

Skip the back-and-forth. Get expert eyes on your project in a focused, structured strategy session. Come prepared, leave with a clear action plan and technical recommendations tailored to your business.

Book Your Call See Previous Work

What You Get

  • Full project audit & strategy

    Technical review of your current site, competitors, and opportunities

  • Custom recommendations document

    Walk away with a written action plan, not just verbal advice

  • Direct access to a senior developer

    10+ years experience in web design, full-stack development & SEO

  • Credit toward project booking

    Discovery call fee is deducted from any project you book within 30 days

Both options include a written summary. Discovery call fees are credited toward any project booked within 30 days.

The more detail you share, the more value you'll get from our session. This brief is sent to me before the call so I can prepare.
